title: Collection Relationship
description: An Eloquent relationship between two Raptor collections. Must be oneOf the supported relationship types.

source.title: Source Collection
source.description: collection_key of the collection that owns or declares this relationship.

type.title: Relationship Type
type.description: The Eloquent relationship method to use on the source model.

methodName.title: Method Name
methodName.description: camelCase PHP method name declared on the source model class.

foreignKey.title: Foreign Key
foreignKey.description: The foreign key column name used to join the tables.
